message:
feat(storage): implement account registry CRUD operations (bd-1bk)

Add comprehensive account management methods to MultiAccountDb:

New Methods:
- upsert_account: Create or update, uses (provider, email) as key
- update_label: Set or clear account label
- update_metadata: Set provider-specific metadata JSON
- reactivate_account: Re-enable deactivated accounts
- count_accounts: Count active accounts, filter by provider
- list_all_accounts: Include inactive accounts in listing

Tests: Added 8 comprehensive unit tests covering upsert (new, update,
reactivate), label/metadata updates, reactivation, counting, and
inactive account listing. Total 22 multi_account tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
